---
title: "Content Management In Workspace"
---

You can manage your Governance content from the Content Management application. Content Management is a section in Workspace from where you can access content in your repository. It is located in the lower part of the left panel in Workspace.

To see the folder structure, expand Content Management.

![The Content Management expand option](data:image/png;base64,)
The expanded Content Management view allows you to browse content, search for documents, create folders and files within the repository, download and upload files, and perform other actions.

For detailed instructions on Content Management, see the Content Management section in the Hyland Workspace documentation.
